# Generate JavaDoc For Method

Generate JavaDoc for method `{METHOD_SIGNATURE}` in `{FILE}`.

## Requirements
- Use concise Java style.
- Include `@param`, `@return`, `@throws` when relevant.
- Mention null-handling and index bounds if applicable.
- Do not change method behavior.

## Output
- Return only the JavaDoc block and the method signature.

## Example placeholders
- `{FILE}`: `src/main/java/com/example/List.java`
- `{METHOD_SIGNATURE}`: `boolean add(int index, E element)`
